title: hypericum undulatum var. boeticum
intro: Hypericum undulatum var. boeticum, also known as St. John's Wort or Goat's Herb, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and mild depression due to its ability to regulate neurotransmitters and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Hypericum undulatum var. boeticum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in wound healing, skin conditions, and immune system support. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
